chapter_title.en: Chapter 193 – The Tawaaf of the women (Tawaaf Al-Nisaa)

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/203)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/203)

parts.text: أَخِيهِ الْحُسَيْنِ بْنِ عَلِيِّ بْنِ يَقْطِينٍ

text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا الْحَسَنِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنِ الْخِصْيَانِ وَ الْمَرْأَةِ الْكَبِيرَةِ أَ عَلَيْهِمْ طَوَافُ النِّسَاءِ قَالَ نَعَمْ عَلَيْهِمُ الطَّوَافُ كُلِّهِمْ .

en.hubeali: Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Al Hassan Bin Ali Bin Yaqteen, from his brother Al Husayn Bin Ali Bin Yaqteen who said,
‘I asked Abu Al-Hassanasws about the eunuchs and the aged women, is there Tawaaf Al-Nisaa upon them?’ Heasws said: ‘Yes, upon them is the Tawaaf (Al-Nisaa), all of them’.
en.sarwar: 4. Ahmad ibn Muhammad has narrated from al-Hassan ibn Ali ibn Yaqtin who has said the following: “I once asked abu al-Hassan, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about the castrated people and old women if Tawaf al- Nisa’ is obligatory upon them. He (the Imam) said, ‘Yes, it is obligatory on all of them.’”
